channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Fatal police shooting of man with knife roils Madison, Wisconsin
item.description: The police shooting death of a man with a knife has roiled Wisconsin’s capital and prompted politicians from the governor to city officials to call for transparency and accountability.

item.title: Teen pleads guilty to murder in a 2024 shooting that left 4 dead at Georgia’s Apalachee High School
No bodycam footage in fatal Madison police shooting, because the department doesn’t require cameras
